subject: docs: document layout over-engineering disaster — 29 days broken, 11 fix commits
body:
Records the full timeline of the home screen layout failure in
AI_MISTAKES.md and adds 8 permanent layout rules to CLAUDE.md AI Notes.

The core lesson: the fix was deleting 145 lines of PanResponder/BottomSheet/
platform-split code and replacing it with a flex column. Every "fix" attempt
that added complexity instead of removing it made things worse. Five review
rounds found 40+ minor bugs but never checked if the map rendered on mobile web.

Tags: documentation, ai-mistakes, lessons
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 5
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: home-screen
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01HnBSG61YnVSBBHYX5JEEiC
title: document layout over-engineering disaster — 29 days broken, 11 fix commits
